description_long: This is a modern, three-seater sofa with a minimalist design, upholstered in a light gray textured fabric. The sofa features three large, loose back cushions and three seat cushions, all of which appear plush and comfortable. The armrests are straight, slim, and at the same height as the backrest, giving the piece a boxy, contemporary silhouette. Decorative elements include three accent pillows in teal, yellow, and gray, as well as a draped light blue throw blanket on one side. The sofa is supported by four slender, black metal legs positioned at the corners, providing a sense of elevation and lightness. The overall look is clean and urban, suitable for both indoor and outdoor urban environments such as patios, parks, or modern public spaces.
description: A modern, light gray three-seater sofa with loose cushions, slim straight armrests, accent pillows, and black metal legs. It features a minimalist, urban design with a textured fabric and decorative throw.
description_view_0: Front view showing three seat and back cushions, three accent pillows, and a blue throw on the right armrest.
description_view_1: Right side view highlighting the slim armrest, the blue throw draped over it, and the depth of the seat cushions.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the continuous back panel and the tops of the three back cushions, with minimal decorative elements visible.
description_view_3: Left side view showing the straight armrest, accent pillows, and the sofa's overall boxy profile.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Three large, loose seat cushions and three matching loose back cushions, all uniform in size and evenly spaced; additional small accent pillows are placed at the corners.
attribute_armrest_style: Straight, slim armrests at the same height as the backrest, with a boxy profile and no visible padding or decorative elements.
attribute_leg_design: Four slender, black metal legs positioned at each corner, straight and exposed, providing a modern and elevated appearance.
attribute_backrest_type: High, straight, and continuous backrest with three large, loose cushions; no tufting or channeling, maintaining a clean and simple look.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Light gray fabric with a subtle, uniform woven texture; no visible patterns, tufting, or decorative stitching.
